query_normalized: kvarn: variance-normalized kv-cache quantization mitigates error accumulation in reasoning tasks computer science
rationale: The paper investigates KV‑cache quantization for LLMs—a core mechanism of the user’s question—though with a different technique (sliding‑window and channel grouping). It provides empirical evidence on how KV‑cache quantization affects model accuracy, satisfying criterion (a) same‑mechanism evidence.
